name: Date Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your bread machine manual.
2. In a large bowl, combine water, butter (softened), sugar, dry milk, salt, and yeast.
3. Mix in the flour until well combined.
4. Add the dates and nuts, stirring until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared bread machine pan.
6. Follow the remaining instructions for your chosen bread size (1 lb or 1.5 lb).
7. When the timer sounds after 15 minutes, stop the bread machine and stir the mixture.
8. Allow the bread to rise for an additional 10-15 minutes before baking in the oven as directed by your appliance's manual.
